method: Inspected the frozen submission manifest and submitted artifact inventory for an executable implementation, environment specification, checkpoints, and evaluation entry point.
observation: The frozen paper-34584 submission contains no executable code artifact or environment capable of reproducing the reported EMG-IMU experiment, so official reproduction and clean-room conformance cannot be executed against submitted code.
limitations: This status does not show that an implementation cannot exist; it records that no executable implementation was available inside the frozen submission evidence boundary.
